session.user:
Run the following commands and report all errors:
1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py` 2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py`
Report ALL output. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report all errors found.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
Check ruff linting on exec scripts, pr commands, and admin.py

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ src/erk/cli/commands/pr/ src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py
Check type errors with ty on exec scripts, pr commands, and admin.py

session.tool_result: All checks passed! Downloading cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) (33.4MiB) Downloaded cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) Using CPython 3.13.12 Creating virtual environment at: .venv Building erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Built erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 130 packages in 386ms
session.assistant:
## Results
Both tools passed without errors:
**Ruff check:** All checks passed!
**Type check (ty):** All checks passed!
No errors were found in: - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/` - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/` - `src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py`
